channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Weather Update: Cloudy Conditions in Delhi and Yellow Alert for Himachal Pradesh Due to Landslide
item.description: The India Meteorological Department (IMD) has forecast generally cloudy weather in Delhi, with the maximum temperature expected around 30°C and the minimum near 16°C. This follows a slightly cooler tr...

item.title: Former BC Ferries CEO reflects on 2006 Queen of the North sinking that claimed two lives
item.description: Twenty years after the tragic sinking of the Queen of the North ferry on March 22, 2006, former BC Ferries president and CEO David Hahn shared his recollections of one of the darkest days in the compa...

item.title: UK Increases Immigration Detention Capacity Following Nigeria-UK Deportation Agreement
item.description: The United Kingdom government has announced e go increase im detention capacity to hold foreign offenders and illegal migrants securely so dem fit deport dem quicker. This announcement come through UK...

item.title: Lahiri shines as Crushers narrowly defeat Southern Guards at LIV Golf SA
item.description: Indian golfer Anirban Lahiri played a decisive role as the Crushers clinched a narrow victory over Louis Oosthuizen’s Southern Guards at the LIV Golf South Africa team event held at Steyn City. Despit...

item.title: Tom Brady Praises Logan Paul's Performance in Flag Football Classic
item.description: NFL legend Tom Brady offered high praise for WWE star Logan Paul after the Fanatics Flag Football Classic on March 21, 2026. Despite a heated feud between the two leading up to the game, Brady express...

item.title: Stormers climb to second on United Rugby Championship standings with 29-21 victory over Dragons
item.description: The Stormers produced a solid performance at home in Cape Town on Sunday, securing a 29-21 victory against the Dragons in the United Rugby Championship. This result propelled the Cape side up to secon...

item.title: Morgan le Fay: From Healer and Scholar to Arthurian Antagonist
item.description: Morgan le Fay is one of the most intriguing figures in Arthurian mythology, often depicted as a powerful sorceress and King Arthur's half-sister. Her early appearances, notably in Geoffrey of Monmouth...

item.title: Arsenal Lose Carabao Cup Final 0-2 to Manchester City as Nico O'Reilly Scores Brace
item.description: Arsenal suffered a 2-0 defeat to Manchester City in the 2026 Carabao Cup final played at Wembley Stadium on March 21, 2026. Mikel Arteta's team were beaten by a quickfire brace from young Manchester C...

item.title: Nairobi County's Corruption and Incompetence Behind Flooding Crisis
item.description: The Nairobi County Government continues to deflect blame for the city's flooding disaster, despite its clear role in the problem. Bulldozing structures built on riparian land is not the solution, as t...

item.title: Public Transport Operators Stage Nationwide Holiday Protest Over Fuel Costs, Delayed Subsidies, and Fare Issues
item.description: On March 23, 2026, a nationwide transport 'holiday' is taking place as public utility vehicle operators, drivers, and transport groups from Luzon, Visayas, and Mindanao suspend operations. Representin...

item.title: Ukraine Accused of Striking Russian Civilian Targets Including Hospitals and Kindergartens Amid Iran Conflict
item.description: According to a report originally published by RT and reposted on nuclear-news.net, Ukrainian forces have carried out multiple strikes on Russian territory and Russian-controlled areas in March 2026, r...

item.title: Clarity Sought on Penalty Recovery for Carmakers under CAFE 3.0
item.description: The Ministries of Power and Road Transport are under pressure to clarify the process for recovering penalties from carmakers who fail to meet the Corporate Average Fuel Efficiency (CAFE) norms. The CA...

item.title: Australia Faces Growing Anxiety Amid Rising Fuel Prices and Supply Disruption
item.description: Australia is grappling with increasing anxiety over rising fuel prices, sparked by a global fuel supply disruption caused by geopolitical tensions, such as the recent attack on Iran. This crisis is ex...

item.title: Oscar Sudi Reminisces About Primary School Days with Throwback Photo of His First Crush
item.description: Oscar Sudi, the Kapseret MP, recently shared a nostalgic throwback photo with his primary school girlfriend, Ruth. The polygamous politician fondly recalled their school days and admitted he thought R...

item.title: Denmark’s general election: Frederiksen seeks third term amid tight race and Greenland tensions
item.description: Denmark votes in a tightly contested general election with Prime Minister Mette Frederiksen seeking a third term in office. The Social Democrats remain the leading party in polling, but support for th...

item.title: Liema Pantsi from Eastern Cape crowned winner of Big Brother Mzansi Season 6
item.description: Liema Pantsi, a 24-year-old reality star from Qonce in the Eastern Cape, has emerged as the winner of 'Big Brother Mzansi: Bazozwa' season 6, taking home the R2 million grand prize. This marks a signi...

item.title: NCDMB Executive Secretary confident Radisson Hotel Yenagoa will open December 2026
item.description: The news article from Premium Times Nigeria, published as a press release on March 22, 2026, reports that the Executive Secretary of the Nigerian Content Development and Monitoring Board (NCDMB), Feli...

item.title: Data Technology and Fair Trade: How Mumbai’s Fishers Are Adapting to Climate Challenges
item.description: The article from Scroll.in’s Eco India series explores how data-based tools and fair trade initiatives are supporting Mumbai’s coastal fishing communities, particularly the traditional Koli fishers, i...

item.title: Ventura County Teen Survives Rattlesnake Bite on Wendy Trail
item.description: A teenage girl from Ventura County was rescued after being bitten by a rattlesnake on the Wendy Trail in Newbury Park on Friday evening. Firefighters responded to the call at 7:30 pm and trekked up th...

item.title: Lebo M takes legal action over misrepresentation of The Lion King chant
item.description: Grammy-winning South African composer Lebohang Morake, popularly known as Lebo M, has filed a lawsuit in the United States seeking between $20 million and $27 million in damages against Zimbabwean com...
